title: Superb Warfare: Block Expansion
description:
Have you ever realized you need decorations when playing supreme warfare?

Well this mod will be in work in progress and hopefully have all the blocks you need.
body:
Have you ever realized you need decorations when playing Superb Warfare?

Superb Warfare: Block Expansion is an addon for Superb Warfare focused on map design. It adds new decorative, structural, and military-themed blocks to help creators build more detailed battlefields, bases, urban environments, and combat zones.

![inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p0C3wQy8/images/8662555edd82e99074dbbdf6a5fadcdcfd7d9b02_350.webp)

![twin hangars](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p0C3wQy8/images/e08129c95a68b0201e2d501bea57f9e111b64fb9_350.webp)


If the mod doesn't have the blocks you need, it will probably come out with them later.
